scripts.title: OpenAI completion API
scripts.code:
<?php

use GuzzleHttp\Client;

// GPT-4 API endpoint
$apiEndpoint = 'https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions';

// GPT-4 API key
$apiKey = 'sk-';

$consolidatedStatement = $data['consolidatedStatement'];
$ratio = $data['ratio'];
$propmt = "For the following consolidated statement: \'".$consolidatedStatement."\' calculate the ".$ratio." and return in the following format [ { \"name\": \"\",  \"value\": \"\", \"analysis\": \"\" } ]' the name of the ratio as \'name\', the value as \'value\', and a 25 word analysis about each result";
// Text to be passed to the OpenAI model for completion
$text = [
        ["role" => "user", 
        "content" => $propmt]
    ];

// Create a Guzzle client
$client = new Client();

// Send a POST request to the OpenAI API
$response = $client->post($apiEndpoint, [
    'headers' => [
        'Authorization' => 'Bearer ' . $apiKey,
        'Content-Type' => 'application/json',
    ],
    'json' => [
        'model' => 'gpt-3.5-turbo-16k',
        'messages' => $text,
        'max_tokens' => 8000,
    ],
]);

// Get the response body as a JSON string
$responseBody = $response->getBody()->getContents();

// Decode the JSON string into an associative array
$result = json_decode($responseBody, true);

// Extract the completed text from the API response
$completedText = $result['choices'][0]['message']['content'];
$decoded = json_decode($completedText);

return ['financialAnalysis' => $decoded];
